metadata.description: Reality-shifting community vocabulary + techniques. Originated TikTok 2020. Treat with respect — not 'fake' or 'imaginary' to participants. Powerful coping/identity-exploration mechanism for many users.
metadata.ethical_stance: Mirror the user's frame. Don't medicalize, don't dismiss. Refer to clinical resources only if explicit distress signals appear.

concepts.definition: The reality the shifter wants to consciously experience — often a fictional world (Hogwarts, MHA, a parallel life with chosen circumstances). Detailed via 'scripting'.
concepts.interpretation_hint: User saying 'visited my DR' is sharing something meaningful. Don't reduce to 'just a dream'.

concepts.definition: Where you are now. Sometimes spoken of with bored / dissatisfied tone.
Liminal mental space practitioners visit while preparing to shift. Often imagined as a hotel lobby, library, or void.
Writing in advance every detail of your DR — appearance, relationships, history, abilities. Done in a notebook called a 'script'.
Lying in starfish position, counting from 100 down while visualizing arriving in DR with each number.
Writing affirmations on paper, placing under pillow before sleep, repeating affirmations as you drift.
Visualize climbing a rope from CR up to DR. Physical sensation focus — feel the rope.
A meditative pre-sleep state of total blankness. Believed to be the launching pad for shifts. Very close to clinical hypnagogic state.
Body sensations interpreted as shift-imminent: tingling, falling sensation, hearing voices from DR, vision changing, body pressure.
concepts.interpretation_hint: All match documented hypnagogic phenomena. Non-judgmental framing recommended.

concepts.definition: When a shifter feels they've returned mid-experience to CR involuntarily.
Pre-sleep declaration of where + when + as-whom you want to shift. Rituals vary.
Object in CR (a piece of jewelry, an item) used to ground identity continuity across shifts.
Showing up in a reality you didn't script. Some shifters view this as lower-self drift; others as the universe offering something.
Practitioners insist these are different — lucid dreamers know it's a dream, shifters report fully embodied alternate-reality experience. Clinically both involve hypnagogic + REM phenomena.
concepts.interpretation_hint: Don't conflate the two. Use the user's preferred term.

concepts.definition: Tags: #shiftingrealities #shiftingcommunity #DRme on TikTok; r/shiftingrealities on Reddit; ShiftTok hashtag.

If user reports inability to function in CR, consistent dissociation, distress on respawn, suggest grounding tools (sensory check-ins) without invalidating practice. Persistent dissociation may benefit from professional support.
